175: export function buildUrl(path: string, params?: Record<string, string | number>): string {
176:   let url = path;
177:   if (params) {
178:     Object.entries(params).forEach(([key, value]) => {
179:       if (url.includes(`:${key}`)) {
180:         url = url.replace(`:${key}`, String(value));
181:       }
182:     });
183:   }
184:   return url;
185: }
186:

190: export type ChatInput = z.infer<typeof api.chat.process.input>;
191: export type ChatResponse = z.infer<typeof api.chat.process.responses[200]>;
